name: Home BancShares Inc.
summary:
Home BancShares (HOMB) reported earnings of $0.64 per share on revenue of $390.29 million for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.62 per share on revenue of $287.63 million. The company beat consensus estimates by 3.23% while revenue grew 5.43% on a year-over-year basis.

Home BancShares Inc through its wholly owned community bank subsidiary, Centennial Bank provides commercial and retail banking and related financial services to businesses, real estate developers and investors, individuals and municipalities.
subject: Home BancShares Beat Consensus Estimates

name: Great Southern Bancorp, Inc.
summary:
Great Southern Bancorp (GSBC) reported earnings of $1.57 per share on revenue of $79.84 million for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.38 per share on revenue of $55.60 million. The company beat consensus estimates by 13.77% while revenue fell 10.48% compared to the same quarter a year ago.

Great Southern Bancorp Inc is a bank holding company & a financial holding company. Its banking operation is engaged in the business of originating residential & commercial real estate loans, construction loans, commercial business loans & consumer loans.
subject: Great Southern Bancorp Beat Consensus Estimates

name: TRX Gold Corporation
summary:
TRX Gold (TRX) reported earnings of $0.01 per share on revenue of $32.85 million for the fiscal third quarter ended May 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.04 per share on revenue of $36.00 million. The company missed consensus estimates by 75.00%.

TRX Gold is a high margin and growing gold company advancing the Buckreef Gold Project in Tanzania.
subject: TRX Gold Missed Consensus Estimates

name: Karooooo Ltd.
summary:
Karooooo (KARO) reported earnings of $0.59 per share on revenue of $96.49 million for the fiscal first quarter ended May 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.51 per share on revenue of $91.78 million. The company beat consensus estimates by 15.69% while revenue grew 38.13% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it continues to expect fiscal 2027 earnings of approximately $2.26 per share. The current consensus earnings estimate is $2.37 per share for the year ending February 28, 2027.

Karooooo, headquartered in Singapore, is a leading global provider of a mobility SaaS platform that maximizes the value of automotive and workflow data by providing real-time data analytics solutions for smart transportation to over 1.4 million connected vehicles.
subject: Karooooo Beat Consensus Estimates

name: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc.
summary:
J.B. Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) reported earnings of $1.91 per share on revenue of $3.50 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.71 per share on revenue of $3.17 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $1.75 per share. The company beat expectations by 9.14% while revenue grew 19.37% on a year-over-year basis.

“I’m grateful for our people and their continued focus on delivering operational excellence around service, safety and cost discipline in this dynamic environment,” said Shelley Simpson, president and CEO. “Our second quarter results reflect the strength of executing our strategy, as we leveraged our investments in our people, technology, and capacity to drive growth and improve profitability. As market conditions continue to evolve, we remain focused on creating long-term value for our shareholders, delivering valuable solutions to our customers while maintaining discipline around returns on our capital.”

JB Hunt Transport Services Inc, together with its wholly owned subsidiaries provides transportation and delivery services to a group of customers and consumers throughout the continental United States, Canada and Mexico.
subject: J.B. Hunt Transport Services Beat Expectations

name: United Airlines
summary:
United Airlines (UAL) reported earnings of $1.99 per share on revenue of $17.67 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.92 per share on revenue of $17.68 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $2.00 per share. The company missed expectations by 0.50% while revenue grew 15.99% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects 2026 earnings of $9.00 to $11.00 per share. The company's previous guidance was earnings of $7.00 to $11.00 per share, and the current consensus earnings estimate is $10.50 per share for the year ending December 31, 2026.

"Our results show why we have been investing in customer improvements throughout every cabin and winning brand-loyal customers," said United CEO Scott Kirby. "United is built to thrive in every environment, and when oil prices spiked in March, we quickly and decisively acted to adjust our schedules, while simultaneously doubling down on our customer investments. Our brand-loyal customers value their travel on United whether they are in Polaris or in Economy. Our network expansions, investment in Starlink, and innovations such as Relax Row are giving customers new reasons to choose United."

United Continental Holdings Inc transports people and cargo through its mainline operations, which use jet aircraft with at least 118 seats, and its regional operations.
subject: United Airlines Missed Expectations

name: Plumas Bancorp
summary:
Plumas Bancorp (PLBC) reported earnings of $1.41 per share on revenue of $33.11 million for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.37 per share on revenue of $28.00 million. The company beat consensus estimates by 2.92% while revenue grew 44.00% on a year-over-year basis.

Plumas Bank is a locally managed, full-service award-winning community bank. With 19 branch offices in Northeastern California and Northern Nevada, and loan production offices in California and southern Oregon.
subject: Plumas Bancorp Beat Consensus Estimates

name: Cintas Corporation
summary:
Cintas (CTAS) reported earnings of $1.29 per share on revenue of $2.91 billion for the fiscal fourth quarter ended May 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.24 per share on revenue of $2.88 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $1.25 per share. The company beat expectations by 3.20% while revenue grew 8.90% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects fiscal 2027 earnings of $5.36 to $5.50 per share on revenue of $12.10 billion to $12.25 billion. The current consensus earnings estimate is $5.42 per share on revenue of $12.07 billion for the year ending May 31, 2027.

Todd M. Schneider, Cintas’ President and Chief Executive Officer, stated “These results conclude an outstanding year for Cintas. We delivered record revenues and operating margins. Our 8.3% organic revenue growth demonstrates our ability to deliver strong results in a dynamic macro environment. Our all-time high gross margin reflects the outstanding performance of our employee-partners and the clear impact of our investments in technology, capacity and talent. These results continue to showcase the strength and resilience of Cintas' value proposition."

Cintas Corp is a provider of corporate identity uniforms. It operates in four segments: Rental Uniforms & Ancillary Products, Uniform Direct Sales, First Aid, Safety & Fire Protection Services, & Document Management Services.
subject: Cintas Beat Expectations

name: Progressive Corp.
summary:
Progressive (PGR) reported earnings of $4.85 per share on revenue of $23.61 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $4.70 per share on revenue of $23.12 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $4.78 per share. The company beat expectations by 1.46% while revenue grew 7.29% on a year-over-year basis.

Progressive Corp is an insurance holding company, whose subsidiaries provides personal and commercial automobile insurance and other property-casualty insurance and related services throughout the United States.
subject: Progressive Beat Expectations

summary:
Community Trust Bancorp (CTBI) reported earnings of $1.64 per share on revenue of $108.84 million for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.52 per share on revenue of $76.30 million. The company beat consensus estimates by 7.89% while revenue grew 6.97% on a year-over-year basis.

Community Trust Bancorp, Inc. is a bank holding company, through its subsidiaries provides commercial and personal banking and wealth management services.
subject: Community Trust Bancorp Beat Consensus Estimates

name: Conagra Brands, Inc.
summary:
Conagra Brands (CAG) reported earnings of $0.47 per share on revenue of $2.88 billion for the fiscal fourth quarter ended May 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.46 per share on revenue of $2.88 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $0.47 per share. The company reported in-line with expectations while revenue grew 3.61% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects fiscal 2027 earnings of $1.40 to $1.50 per share on revenue of $10.94 billion to $11.17 billion. The current consensus earnings estimate is $1.65 per share on revenue of $11.14 billion for the year ending May 31, 2027.

ConAgra Foods Inc is a packaged foods company. It sells its products through grocery, convenience, mass merchandise, club, and drug stores.
subject: Conagra Brands Reported In-line with Expectations

name: Morgan Stanley
summary:
Morgan Stanley (MS) reported earnings of $3.46 per share on revenue of $34.47 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $2.89 per share on revenue of $19.38 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $2.93 per share. The company beat expectations by 18.09% while revenue grew 17.44% on a year-over-year basis.

Morgan Stanley is a leading global financial services firm providing a wide range of investment banking, securities, wealth management and investment management services.
subject: Morgan Stanley Beat Expectations

name: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation
summary:
The Bank of New York Mellon (BNY) reported earnings of $2.46 per share on revenue of $10.19 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $2.20 per share on revenue of $5.38 billion. The company beat consensus estimates by 11.82% while revenue fell 2.25% compared to the same quarter a year ago.

BNY is a global financial services platforms company at the heart of the world's capital markets.
subject: The Bank of New York Mellon Beat Consensus Estimates

name: PNC Financial Services Group, Inc.
summary:
PNC Financial Services Group (PNC) reported earnings of $4.85 per share on revenue of $9.46 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $4.51 per share on revenue of $6.42 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $4.71 per share. The company beat expectations by 2.97% while revenue grew 12.97% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said in its earnings presentation it now expects 2026 revenue of approximately $26.10 billion. The company's previous guidance was revenue of approximately $25.64 billion, and the current consensus revenue estimate is $25.87 billion for the year ending December 31, 2026.

Bill Demchak, PNC Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, said, “Our strong second quarter performance reflects the disciplined execution of our growth strategy and positions us well for the second half of the year. We remain focused on delivering results that support our customers, shareholders and communities. Our successful FirstBank conversion, strong capital position and announced dividend increase provide further evidence of the strength and resilience of our franchise.”

PNC Financial Services Group Inc is a financial services company. It operates in six segments: Retail Banking; Corporate & Institutional Banking; Asset Management Group; Residential Mortgage Banking; BlackRock; and Non-Strategic Assets Portfolio.
subject: PNC Financial Services Group Beat Expectations

name: First Horizon National Corp
summary:
First Horizon National (FHN) reported earnings of $0.54 per share on revenue of $1.24 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.52 per share on revenue of $873.47 million. The Earnings Whisper number was $0.56 per share. The company missed expectations by 3.57% while revenue grew 0.65% on a year-over-year basis.

First Horizon Corp. is a leading regional financial services company, dedicated to helping our clients, communities and associates unlock their full potential with capital and counsel.
subject: First Horizon National Missed Expectations

name: Johnson & Johnson
summary:
Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) reported earnings of $2.90 per share on revenue of $25.31 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $2.84 per share on revenue of $25.04 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $2.86 per share. The company beat expectations by 1.40% while revenue grew 6.60% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects 2026 earnings of $11.60 to $11.75 per share on revenue of $100.30 billion to $100.90 billion. The company's previous guidance was earnings of $11.45 to $11.65 per share on revenue of $100.30 billion to $101.30 billion, and the current consensus earnings estimate is $11.58 per share on revenue of $100.81 billion for the year ending December 31, 2026.

“Johnson & Johnson delivered strong second-quarter results, demonstrating the power of our innovation, the depth of our portfolio and the momentum in our pipeline as we advance transformative treatments that address the world’s toughest health challenges,” said Joaquin Duato, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, Johnson & Johnson. “With raised guidance and quarterly sales surpassing $25 billion, we are on track to meet our 2026 target of more than $100 billion in annual revenue for the first time in our Company’s 140-year history.”

Johnson & Johnson is a holding company, which is engaged in the research and development, manufacture and sale of products in the health care field within its Consumer, Pharmaceutical and Medical Devices, and Diagnostics business segments.
subject: Johnson & Johnson Beat Expectations

name: Elevance Health
summary:
Elevance Health (ELV) reported earnings of $7.45 per share on revenue of $50.47 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $6.18 per share on revenue of $48.45 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $6.43 per share. The company beat expectations by 15.86% while revenue grew 1.40% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects 2026 earnings of at least $27.00 per share. The company's previous guidance was earnings of at least $26.75 per share, andt the current consensus earnings estimate is $26.86 per share for the year ending December 31, 2026.

Gail K. Boudreaux, President and Chief Executive Officer, said, "Our second quarter results exceeded our outlook, supported by disciplined execution and improved operating performance across our diversified portfolio. We are raising our 2026 adjusted EPS guidance to at least $27.00 and accelerating targeted investments in the capabilities that matter most: medical cost management, member experience, provider connectivity, operating efficiency, and Carelon’s value-based solutions. These actions will strengthen how we operate, improve consistency over time, and reinforce our confidence in returning to at least 12% adjusted EPS growth in 2027 off our 2026 earnings baseline.”

Elevance Health is a lifetime, trusted health partner fueled by its purpose to improve the health of humanity.
subject: Elevance Health Beat Expectations

name: BlackRock, Inc.
summary:
BlackRock (BLK) reported earnings of $13.91 per share on revenue of $7.08 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $12.67 per share on revenue of $6.75 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $12.89 per share. The company beat expectations by 7.91% while revenue grew 30.63% on a year-over-year basis.

BlackRock Inc along with its subsidiaries, provides investment management services to institutional clients and to individual investors through various investment vehicles.
subject: BlackRock Beat Expectations

name: M&T Bank Corp
summary:
M&T Bank (MTB) reported earnings of $5.35 per share on revenue of $3.36 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $4.66 per share on revenue of $2.48 billion. The company beat consensus estimates by 14.81% while revenue grew 2.07% on a year-over-year basis.

M&T Bank Corp is a New York business corporation and a bank holding company. The Company through subsidiaries provides individuals, corporations and other businesses, and institutions with commercial and retail banking services.
subject: M&T Bank Beat Consensus Estimates

name: ASML Holding
summary:
ASML (ASML) reported earnings of $8.81 per share on revenue of $10.84 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $7.98 per share on revenue of $10.28 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $8.32 per share. The company beat expectations by 5.89% while revenue grew 24.24% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects third-quarter revenue of $12.56 billion to $13.70 billion and now expects 2026 revenue of $49.10 billion to $51.38 billion. The company's previous guidance was 2026 revenue of $42.4 billion to $47.1 billion. The current consensus revenue estimate is $11.34 billion for the quarter ending September 30, 2026 and revenue of $45.35 billion for the year ending December 31, 2026.

ASML President and Chief Executive Officer Christophe Fouquet said, "Our second-quarter total net sales were €9.3 billion and gross margin came in at 54.0%, both above guidance, driven primarily by higher than expected Installed Base Management sales. Ongoing AI-related investments and continued progress in AI technologies are driving demand for advanced Logic and Memory chips, further strengthening the semiconductor industry's growth outlook. Our customers, in turn, continue to accelerate their capacity expansion plans."

ASML Holding NV is a provider of lithography systems for the semiconductor industry, manufactures complex machines that are critical to the production of integrated circuits or chips. Its products include TWINSCAN, PAS 5500, Optics, among others.
subject: ASML Beat Expectations
